seoTitle: Diwan vs Dixie — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Diwan and Dixie. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Diwan and Dixie.
heading: Diwan vs Dixie — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Diwan, Queensland and Dixie, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Diwan has a lower overall climate risk score (26/100) compared to Dixie (27/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Diwan or Dixie safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Diwan has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Dixie scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Diwan scores 29/100 for bushfire risk. Dixie scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Diwan or Dixie?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Diwan has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area face minimal climate value impact based on current projections.
